properties.dose: Oral Low: 5-7.5mg Common: 10-20mg  Heavy: 20mg+ | Insufflated Low: 2-4mg Common: 4-6mg Heavy: 6-10mg+
properties.duration: Oral_IR: 4-8 hours | Oral_ER: 6-14 hours | Insufflated 5-8 hours | Plugged: 4-7 hours | IV: 2-4 hours. | Note: Tolerance + contents in your stomach can cause this to be quite different.
properties.effects: Euphoria, Dry Mouth, Mood lift, Itchiness, Relaxant, Constipation, Pupil constriction, Analgesia.
properties.onset: Oral_IR: 20-40 minutes | Oral_ER: 60-90 minutes. | Insufflated: 1-5 minutes | Plugged: 15-30 minutes. | IV: 0-1 minutes
properties.summary: A powerful semisynthetic opioid analgesic also known as Opana. A derivative of morphine, it is approximately ten times as potent as morphine. The drug has a low oral bioavailability and as such it is usually insufflated or taken rectally.
properties.warning: NOTE: There have been reports of a rare blood disorder from intravenous use of Oxymorphone ER. It is strongly recommended to take this into consideration before taking the drug this way.
